name: Find the stalker
short_description: Find the Stalker - a psychological thriller, that is set in a rural village. As our heroine, deal with your dark past, before it deals with YOU.
detailed_description:
"Find the Stalker" is a story about rough childhood, delusions, and the rose-tinted glasses, that are to be broken with the shards facing inside.

Our heroine is faced with the heritage of an old house in a rural village, where she lived during yonger days. It was decided to sell the house, that had only childhood memories in it's walls. But such a simple task turns out the wrong way. The house is being watched...or rather she is being stalked?

Key Features


  • Action-packed thriller with charismatic characters, realistic dialogues and hand-drawn visuals.
  • Fully voice-acted!
  • Classic VN with point-and-click quest features.
  • Four thought-through and illustrated endings.
  • Seven achievements, that unlock bonus content.
